Successful Allocations

} @if (giErrors().length > 0) {

Failed Allocations

@for (r of giErrors(); track $index) { }
AccountAmountError
{{ r.accountNo || '-' }} {{ formatCurrency(r.allocatedAmount || 0) }} {{ r.errorMessage || r.status || '-' }}
}
} }
@if (searchOpen()) {

Account Search

@if (searchResults().length > 0) {
@for (r of searchResults(); track $index) { }
AccountOwnerAddressActions
{{ r.accountNumber || r.accountNo || '-' }} {{ r.ownerName || r.name || '-' }} {{ r.propertyAddress || r.address || '-' }}
} @else if (!searching() && (searchAccountNo() || searchName())) {

No accounts found

Try a different account number, name, or check for typos.

}
} @if (showCommitConfirm()) {

Commit Payments

You are about to commit {{ matchCounts().ready }} payment(s) totalling {{ formatCurrency(totalImportAmount()) }} to the ledger.

This action cannot be undone.

} @if (showResetConfirm()) {

Discard Review?

You have {{ transactions().length }} transaction(s) in review. Going back will discard all matching and editing work.

} @if (showGiSubmitConfirm()) {

Submit Import

You are about to submit {{ giPreviewRows().filter(r => r.isValid).length }} valid payment(s) totalling {{ formatCurrency(giPreviewTotal()) }} for processing.

This action cannot be undone.

} @if (showGiBackConfirm()) {

Discard Preview?

You have {{ giPreviewRows().length }} validated row(s) ready for submission. Going back will discard this preview.

}
